unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: chunk_is_empty
chunk_is_full
chunk_len
chunk_space
chunk_reset
chunk_append
function.parameter_list: (struct buf_chunk *chunk, const unsigned char *buf, size_t len)

function.name: chunk_read
chunk_slurpn
function.parameter_list: (struct buf_chunk *chunk, size_t max_len, Curl_bufq_reader *reader, void *reader_ctx, CURLcode *err)

function.name: chunk_peek
function.parameter_list: (const struct buf_chunk *chunk, const unsigned char **pbuf, size_t *plen)

function.name: chunk_peek_at
function.parameter_list: (const struct buf_chunk *chunk, size_t offset, const unsigned char **pbuf, size_t *plen)

function.name: chunk_skip
chunk_list_free
Curl_bufcp_init
bufcp_take
bufcp_put
Curl_bufcp_free
bufq_init
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, struct bufc_pool *pool, size_t chunk_size, size_t max_chunks, int opts)

function.name: Curl_bufq_init2
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, size_t chunk_size, size_t max_chunks, int opts)

function.name: Curl_bufq_init
Curl_bufq_initp
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, struct bufc_pool *pool, size_t max_chunks, int opts)

function.name: Curl_bufq_free
Curl_bufq_reset
Curl_bufq_len
Curl_bufq_space
Curl_bufq_is_empty
Curl_bufq_is_full
get_spare
prune_head
get_non_full_tail
Curl_bufq_write
Curl_bufq_cwrite
Curl_bufq_read
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, unsigned char *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_bufq_cread
Curl_bufq_peek
Curl_bufq_peek_at
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, size_t offset, const unsigned char **pbuf, size_t *plen)

function.name: Curl_bufq_skip
Curl_bufq_pass
Curl_bufq_write_pass
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, const unsigned char *buf, size_t len, Curl_bufq_writer *writer, void *writer_ctx, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_bufq_sipn
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, size_t max_len, Curl_bufq_reader *reader, void *reader_ctx, CURLcode *err)

unit.comment: /** * Read up to `max_len` bytes and append it to the end of the buffer queue. * if `max_len` is 0, no limit is imposed and the call behaves exactly * the same as `Curl_bufq_slurp()`. * Returns the total amount of buf read (may be 0) or -1 on other * reader errors. * Note that even in case of a -1 chunks may have been read and * the buffer queue will have different length than before. */

function.name: bufq_slurpn
function.parameter_list: (struct bufq *q, size_t max_len, Curl_bufq_reader *reader, void *reader_ctx, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_bufq_slurp
